hook.summary: High-contrast promotional offer for horse racing betting.
hook.visual_action: Bold black text 'BET £10' appears on a bright yellow background, quickly expanding to show the full 'GET £10' offer with horse racing footage in the background.
hook.text_overlay: AVAILABLE EVERY DAY OF AINTREE BET £10 GET £10 ON RACING MULTIS
hook.voiceover_transcript: With Betfair, bet ten pound and get a free ten pound bet on racing multis.

scene_flow: Initial flash of 'BET £10' text on a solid yellow background.
Transition to the full offer 'BET £10 GET £10' with a blurred horse racing clip behind the text.
Rapid zoom-in on the Betfair logo and stylized typography.
Final static frame with the Betfair logo and mandatory gambling awareness disclaimers.
audience_proxy: Adult sports bettors in the UK looking for promotional incentives during major horse racing events like Aintree.
